Hero.headline: One unified platform for B2B booking & logistics shipment management.
Hero.subheadline: An integrated B2B solution: rail cargo booking (FCL/LCL port-to-port), public tracking, and online invoice payment. A flexible platform ready to expand into multimodal logistics.

Landing.featuresLead: Aligned with the product brief: company onboarding through integrated payments.
Landing.f1Body: Submit origin, destination, service type (FCL/LCL), and see an estimated price before sending — matching your operational workflow.
Landing.f2Body: The MVP focuses on rail and port-to-port lanes; the data model is ready for door legs or additional modes.
Landing.f3Body: Status, timeline, photos, origin, destination, and ETA — publicly accessible without login, as defined in the brief.
Landing.f4Body: Per-shipment billing, payment status, and planned gateway integration for registered customers.
Landing.f5Body: Company Admin, Operations, and Finance roles in one portal: bookings, shipments, invoices, and company settings.
Landing.f6Body: Architecture accommodates trucking, sea freight, and air cargo later without rewriting your core process.
Landing.footerTagline: Multimodal booking and shipment management for corporate customers.
Landing.footerRights: © IDNVerse Karya Nusantara. All rights reserved.

PlaceholderPages.servicesBody: This page will describe INVLOGI services (rail cargo, FCL/LCL, and more). Marketing and ops can replace this copy anytime.
PlaceholderPages.infoBody: Use this page for FAQ, policies, or announcements. Replace with official content from your team.

Estimate.title: Shipping cost estimate
Estimate.subtitle: Enter route and service to see an indicative price. No login — company discounts are not applied here.
Estimate.loadError: Failed to load master data. Check connectivity and API configuration.
Estimate.estimateError: Could not compute the estimate. Check route and service selections.
Estimate.formDescription: Pick locations, mode, and service. For FCL choose a container type; for LCL fill weight or CBM.
Estimate.resultNote: Indicative figure from sell rates and routes in the system. Final pricing follows operational confirmation.

Login.welcomeSubtitle: Login to manage shipments and track your logistics
